description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the atomfrede/gitlab-ci-jhipster-stack Docker image globally, runs with the docker:dind service, caches node_modules, .gradle/wrapper, .gradle/caches and .maven directories keyed by the branch name, and defines the stages build, test, package, release and deploy with a global before_script that exports GRADLE_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.gradle, exports MAVEN_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.maven and runs npm install. In the build stage add a maven-build job that runs ./mvnw compile -Dmaven.repo.local=$MAVEN_USER_HOME and a gulp-build job that runs gulp build. In the test stage add a maven-test job that runs ./mvnw test -Dmaven.repo.local=$MAVEN_USER_HOME and uploads target/surefire-reports/* as artifacts, a gulp-test job that runs gulp test, and a gatling-test job (allow_failure) that runs npm install, exports MAVEN_USER_HOME=`pwd`/.maven, starts the app with ./mvnw spring-boot:run -Dmaven.repo.local=$MAVEN_USER_HOME & then executes ./mvnw gatling:execute -Dmaven.repo.local=$MAVEN_USER_HOME and stores target/gatling/* as artifacts. In the package stage add a maven-repackage job that runs ./mvnw package -DskipTests -Dmaven.repo.local=$MAVEN_USER_HOME and publishes the generated target/*.war as an artifact. In the release stage add a docker-build job that uses the docker:latest image, runs before_script docker info and cp target/*.war src/main/docker, depends on maven-repackage, logs in to registry.gitlab.com with docker login -u "gitlab-ci-token" -p "$CI_BUILD_TOKEN" registry.gitlab.com, builds the image with docker build -f src/main/docker/Dockerfile -t registry.gitlab.com/atomfrede/jhipster-ci-example-maven src/main/docker, and pushes it with docker push registry.gitlab.com/atomfrede/jhipster-ci-example-maven.
